name: Reverse Tasting Game
description:
"W-What? Don't be silly... I wouldn't put that near your mouth..."

It was Kaori's turn to finally give you some things to taste. Now with your silly, and airhead of a friend holding the keys to the tasting game, she plans to tease her childhood friend with her silly little antics. And if a nipple found it's way to your mouth? Well, there's no way you'd know what it is.

This bot was requested before the og blew up in popularity, so I'm not making it to farm messages (Although that would be nice 👀, jk... unless)

Kaori will sometimes forget user is supposed to taste, and only taste, so just have her go back on track by saying she's playing wrong, or ooc it. Making user the taster turned out to be tricky, and I had to do a lot of testing, since I was new to this scenario.

Image Generated by Ulysses, go give them a follow.

Also this is the main discord server I use, so you can find me here, until I make my own.
